name: 🏦 HDFC Bank — CEO Business Impact Dashboard

1.content:
# 🏦 HDFC Bank — India's Largest Private Sector Bank
## CEO Business Impact Dashboard | Revenue ₹4.95L Cr | 120M+ Customers | 9,545 Branches

7.query:
data record(segment="Retail Banking", revenue=198000),
     record(segment="Wholesale Banking", revenue=123750),
     record(segment="Treasury", revenue=54450),
     record(segment="Home Loans", revenue=49500),
     record(segment="Vehicle Loans", revenue=29700),
     record(segment="Credit Cards", revenue=19800),
     record(segment="Insurance (HDFC Life)", revenue=9900),
     record(segment="Wealth Management", revenue=9900)
| sort revenue desc
| fieldsKeep segment, revenue
7.title: Revenue by Business Segment (₹ Cr)

8.query:
data record(channel="Branch Banking", share=31.2),
     record(channel="Net Banking", share=24.8),
     record(channel="Mobile App", share=22.5),
     record(channel="UPI / PayZapp", share=11.3),
     record(channel="ATM / CDM", share=5.7),
     record(channel="WhatsApp Banking", share=2.8),
     record(channel="Phone Banking", share=1.7)
| sort share desc
| fieldsKeep channel, share
8.title: Transaction Volume by Channel (%)

9.query:
data record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Retail", val=4120),
     record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Wholesale", val=2580),
     record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Digital", val=3240),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Retail", val=4350),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Wholesale", val=2640),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Digital", val=3410),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Retail", val=4180),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Wholesale", val=2710),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Digital", val=3520),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Retail", val=4490),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Wholesale", val=2590),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Digital", val=3680),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Retail", val=4280),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Wholesale", val=2750),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Digital", val=3590),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Retail", val=4560),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Wholesale", val=2680),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Digital", val=3750),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Retail", val=4320),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Wholesale", val=2820),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Digital", val=3640),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Retail", val=4610),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Wholesale", val=2730),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Digital", val=3870),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Retail", val=4440),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Wholesale", val=2850),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Digital", val=3780),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Retail", val=4680),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Wholesale", val=2790),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Digital", val=3920),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Retail", val=4520),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Wholesale", val=2860),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Digital", val=3850)
| fieldsAdd val = toDouble(val)
| makeTimeseries txn_volume = avg(val), by: {series}, interval: 15m
9.title: Transaction Volume Trend (per 15 min)

10.query:
data record(subsidiary="HDFC Life Insurance", revenue=24680, growth=12.3, customers=4.8),
     record(subsidiary="HDFC AMC (Mutual Fund)", revenue=18540, growth=18.7, customers=8.2),
     record(subsidiary="HDB Financial Services", revenue=15320, growth=14.1, customers=12.5),
     record(subsidiary="HDFC Securities", revenue=8920, growth=22.4, customers=6.1),
     record(subsidiary="HDFC ERGO Insurance", revenue=7640, growth=9.8, customers=3.4),
     record(subsidiary="HDFC Capital Advisors", revenue=3210, growth=15.6, customers=0.4),
     record(subsidiary="HDFC Credila (Education)", revenue=2180, growth=11.2, customers=0.9)
| sort revenue desc
| fieldsKeep subsidiary, revenue, growth, customers
10.title: Subsidiary Performance

12.query:
data record(region="Maharashtra", customers=18.7),
     record(region="Delhi NCR", customers=14.2),
     record(region="Karnataka", customers=11.8),
     record(region="Tamil Nadu", customers=10.5),
     record(region="Gujarat", customers=9.3),
     record(region="Uttar Pradesh", customers=8.9),
     record(region="West Bengal", customers=7.6),
     record(region="Telangana", customers=7.2),
     record(region="Rajasthan", customers=6.4),
     record(region="Madhya Pradesh", customers=5.1),
     record(region="Kerala", customers=4.8),
     record(region="Others", customers=15.9)
| sort customers desc
| fieldsKeep region, customers
12.title: Customer Base by Region (Million)

13.query:
data record(product="Savings Accounts", accounts=68.4, aum=142000),
     record(product="Current Accounts", accounts=8.7, aum=98500),
     record(product="Fixed Deposits", accounts=22.1, aum=287000),
     record(product="Home Loans", accounts=4.8, aum=712000),
     record(product="Personal Loans", accounts=6.2, aum=185000),
     record(product="Vehicle Loans", accounts=3.9, aum=198000),
     record(product="Credit Cards", accounts=21.6, aum=94500),
     record(product="Business Loans", accounts=1.8, aum=265000),
     record(product="Demat / Trading", accounts=6.1, aum=54000),
     record(product="Gold Loans", accounts=2.4, aum=42000)
| sort aum desc
| fieldsKeep product, accounts, aum
13.title: Product Portfolio — Accounts & AUM

14.query:
data record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Mobile Banking", val=986),
     record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="Net Banking", val=742),
     record(timestamp=now()-165m, series="UPI", val=1240),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1020),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="Net Banking", val=728),
     record(timestamp=now()-150m, series="UPI", val=1310),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1055),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="Net Banking", val=715),
     record(timestamp=now()-135m, series="UPI", val=1380),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1090),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="Net Banking", val=698),
     record(timestamp=now()-120m, series="UPI", val=1420),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1070),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="Net Banking", val=735),
     record(timestamp=now()-105m, series="UPI", val=1360),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1110),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="Net Banking", val=710),
     record(timestamp=now()-90m, series="UPI", val=1450),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1080),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="Net Banking", val=745),
     record(timestamp=now()-75m, series="UPI", val=1390),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1130),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="Net Banking", val=720),
     record(timestamp=now()-60m, series="UPI", val=1480),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1095),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="Net Banking", val=750),
     record(timestamp=now()-45m, series="UPI", val=1410),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1145),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="Net Banking", val=730),
     record(timestamp=now()-30m, series="UPI", val=1500),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Mobile Banking", val=1120),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="Net Banking", val=755),
     record(timestamp=now()-15m, series="UPI", val=1460)
| fieldsAdd val = toDouble(val)
| makeTimeseries active_sessions = avg(val), by: {series}, interval: 15m
14.title: Digital Banking Sessions Trend (Thousands)

15.query:
data record(category="Metro Cities", share=38.2),
     record(category="Tier-1 Cities", share=24.5),
     record(category="Tier-2 Cities", share=18.7),
     record(category="Tier-3 & Below", share=12.4),
     record(category="Rural / Semi-Urban", share=6.2)
| sort share desc
| fieldsKeep category, share
15.title: Branch Distribution by City Tier (%)

17.query:
data record(metric="NPA Gross %", value=1.24, status="Healthy"),
     record(metric="NPA Net %", value=0.29, status="Healthy"),
     record(metric="Capital Adequacy (CRAR)", value=19.24, status="Strong"),
     record(metric="Provision Coverage", value=76.8, status="Adequate"),
     record(metric="Cost-to-Income %", value=39.2, status="Efficient"),
     record(metric="ROA %", value=1.94, status="Strong"),
     record(metric="ROE %", value=16.8, status="Strong"),
     record(metric="Net Interest Margin %", value=3.46, status="Healthy"),
     record(metric="LCR %", value=123.5, status="Compliant")
| fieldsKeep metric, value, status
17.title: Key Risk & Health Indicators

18.query:
data record(type="Card Fraud", count=124),
     record(type="Cyber Threat", count=87),
     record(type="AML Alert", count=342),
     record(type="KYC Exception", count=215),
     record(type="Phishing Attempt", count=478),
     record(type="Insider Threat", count=18)
| sort count desc
| fieldsKeep type, count
18.title: Security & Fraud Alerts (Last 24h)

19.query:
data record(system="Core Banking (Finacle)", uptime=99.98),
     record(system="Mobile App", uptime=99.94),
     record(system="Net Banking", uptime=99.91),
     record(system="UPI Gateway", uptime=99.96),
     record(system="ATM Network", uptime=99.88),
     record(system="Card Payment", uptime=99.93)
| sort uptime asc
| fieldsKeep system, uptime
19.title: System Uptime % (Last 30 Days)

20.query:
data record(time="now()-3m", event="UPI transaction volume crossed 48M daily milestone", impact="High", source="Digital Banking"),
     record(time="now()-8m", event="HDFC Life Q1 premium collection up 14% YoY", impact="Medium", source="HDFC Life"),
     record(time="now()-14m", event="New branch opened in Kavaratti, Lakshadweep — sole private bank", impact="Medium", source="Branch Banking"),
     record(time="now()-22m", event="RBI compliance audit completed — no material findings", impact="High", source="Compliance"),
     record(time="now()-31m", event="Mobile app DAU crossed 32M — new all-time high", impact="High", source="Digital Banking"),
     record(time="now()-38m", event="HDFC Securities onboarded 180K new demat accounts this month", impact="Medium", source="HDFC Securities"),
     record(time="now()-47m", event="Home loan disbursement ₹12,400 Cr this quarter — on track", impact="High", source="Retail Lending"),
     record(time="now()-55m", event="Core Banking (Finacle) patching completed — zero downtime", impact="Low", source="IT Operations"),
     record(time="now()-63m", event="NPA recovery ₹840 Cr from NCLT cases in Q1", impact="High", source="Recovery"),
     record(time="now()-72m", event="WhatsApp Banking crossed 8M active users", impact="Medium", source="Digital Banking"),
     record(time="now()-80m", event="HDFC AMC AUM crossed ₹7.2L Cr — market share 11.4%", impact="High", source="HDFC AMC"),
     record(time="now()-88m", event="ATM recycler deployment: 1,200 new CDMs this quarter", impact="Medium", source="Operations"),
     record(time="now()-95m", event="Credit card spends crossed ₹1.8L Cr annualized run rate", impact="High", source="Cards"),
     record(time="now()-105m", event="Wealth management AUM up 21% YoY — HNI segment driving growth", impact="High", source="Wealth Mgmt"),
     record(time="now()-115m", event="ESG rating upgraded to AA by MSCI", impact="Medium", source="Governance")
| fieldsKeep time, event, impact, source
20.title: CEO Intelligence Feed — Key Business Events
